comments: Approved. The patch progression verified via git show on 81fd04d and 2aecb75 matches the execution-result artifact: 81fd04d populated the 8 required EN/ZH documentation targets plus task artifacts, and 2aecb75 added the third concrete YAML example to EN/ZH yaml-dag-engine.md. The required files contain technical content instead of placeholders, schema-reference.md accurately embeds schemas/execution-contract.schema.json, at least 3 concrete YAML examples are present (feature-development, assist, custom-deploy-pipeline), and explicit Git/CLI collaboration commands are documented (including git fetch origin agent-sync, git checkout agent-sync, agent-protocol-review, git checkout main, git merge agent-sync, git push origin main, plus npx team-agents-cowork-init in installation). The full patch range 81fd04d^..2aecb75 modifies only documentation/EN/**, documentation/ZH/**, and tasks/v0.8-docs-archon-upgrade/**; no src/, bin/, workflow/dispatch.json, or iteration-state.json/runtime semantics changes were introduced.
